title: rootless: error out if there are not enough UIDs/GIDs available
body:
Most container images assume there are at least 65536 UIDs/GIDs
available.  Raise an error if there are not enough IDs allocated to
the current user.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
I'm fine with this.  Although it is a little disappointing.
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit bf05da5 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan bf05da5f8da15ad603659efa4b27a909f677f9b4 -->

> I'm fine with this. Although it is a little disappointing.

I've left the hard coded value only when there is an error reading the value from the `/proc/sys/kernel/overflowuid` and `/proc/sys/kernel/overflowgid` files
